title: Amtech G0325 180mm (7") Bucket trowel with soft grip
features: DURABLE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: This 180mm (7") bucket trowel has a hardened and tempered steel blade with a soft grip for added comfort and ease of use
STEEL BODY: Durable construction provides strength for long-term performance
SIZE CAPACITY: 7 inch / 180 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Trowel See more
